title: NASA’s Chandra Reveals ‘Red, White, Blue’ Universe for US 250th
summary: NASA celebrates the US's 250th birthday with vibrant cosmic images! Discover how X-ray, infrared, and optical light reveal a deeper understanding of celestial wonders like Cassiopeia A, NGC 3603, NGC 4736, and ZwCl 0024+1652. These stunning visuals offer a peek into the mysteries of our universe.
script: 새로운 우주 이미지가 나왔네요!  🇺🇸, 이번에는 달빛을 따스하게 받는 우리 세상의 이야기를 전하고 싶다고!
